data.title: Correction: Suspension of oral hygiene practices highlights key bacterial shifts in saliva, tongue, and tooth plaque during gingival inflammation and resolution
data.authors: Michael William Hall, Nimali Chandhema Wellappuli, Ruo Chen Huang, Kay Wu, David King Lam, Michael Glogauer, Robert Gerald Beiko, Dilani Braziunas Senadheera
data.description:
Correction: Suspension of oral hygiene practices highlights key bacterial shifts in saliva, 
tongue, and tooth plaque during ging Page 1 CORRECTION OPEN Correction: Suspension 
of oral hygiene practices highlights key bacterial shifts in saliva, tongue, and tooth plaque 
during gingival inflammation and resolution Michael William Hall, Nimali Chandhema 
Wellappuli , Ruo Chen Huang, Kay Wu, David King Lam, Michael Glogauer, Robert Gerald 
Beiko and Dilani Braziunas Senadheera © The Author(s) 2023 ISME Communications; https://doi.org/10.1038/s43705-023-00258-0

published online 25 March 2023 In this article the author name David King Lam was 
incorrectly written as David Kitping Lam. The original article has been corrected. Open
